outcome_record.event_name: IBU World Cup Biathlon — Men's 15km Mass Start

prediction.pre_match_note: Biathlon mass start. Predicted winner: zero misses in last 3 races (clean shoot rate ×1.12). Norwegian athlete at home circuit. Nordic crowd advantage ×1.35 regional ATM. Normal snow conditions — no adjustment.

calibration_flags.notes: Biathlon clean shoot rate ×1.12 validated. Zero-penalty shooting record correctly identified as dominant signal. Norwegian home circuit ATM ×1.35 confirmed.
